description: JobKorea is a Korean employment platform that lists job postings and recruitment information. It also offers job-feed syndication for approved institutions such as public agencies and schools.
summary: JobKorea exposes a public unauthenticated MCP endpoint plus a partner-style HTTP job-data API program where approved users receive a unique IP-bound call URL for job posting and new-graduate recruitment feeds.

surfaces.name: JobKorea Job Posting API
surfaces.url: (issued per approved requester as a unique call link)
